project_name: Badan POM Jember - Inventory & Asset Management Dashboard
emotional_tone: Professional, authoritative, trustworthy, clear, and efficient

headings.usage: Use for all module titles, dashboard metrics, and form headers
headings.anti_pattern: Do not use Inter or generic sans. Do not over-center text.

body.usage: Use for data tables, form inputs, and general text to maintain tabular clarity and technical precision

primary.name: Government Navy
primary.usage: Primary CTAs, sidebar backgrounds, active states, official headers

secondary.name: Signal Red
secondary.usage: Alerts, low stock warnings, Indonesian identity accent, destructive actions

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: MODE B: THE CONTROL ROOM GRID
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-4, p-6, p-8. Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense content, tables, and forms. Center only for empty states or specific modal dialogs.
layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Flat Solid. Avoid Glassmorphism for data clarity. Dashboards use flat white backgrounds with 1px subtle borders (border-slate-200) and no default shadow.

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, rounded-lg. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow (shadow-sm).
components.tables: Dense, high-contrast headers. Alternating row colors (bg-slate-50/50) or clear border-b for readability.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-blue-900 text-white hover:bg-blue-800. Danger: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700. Secondary: border border-slate-200 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-50.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Left-aligned labels. Explicit focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-900).
components.mobile_scanner: Module 9 (QR Scan) must be mobile-first. Large touch targets (min-h-[48px] for buttons). High contrast camera overlay. Bottom sheet for scan results.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons for dense dashboard navigation and actions. Keep strokes consistent (Regular or Bold weight depending on active state).

motion.transitions: Use specific properties. Example: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. No 'transition-all'.
motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must have visible hover and focus states.
motion.page_load: Staggered fade-in for dashboard grid items.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Never use text-slate-400 on white for critical data.
accessibility.aria: Include aria-labels for all icon-only buttons.

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
testing.convention: kebab-case, role-based. Examples: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='inventory-table-row', data-testid='spb-request-form'.

media_urls.description: Warehouse filled with boxes. Use with a heavy white/blue overlay (bg-white/80 or bg-blue-900/90) as a subtle background texture for the public SPB request portal or login screen.
Staff in warehouse holding scanner. Use for the mobile app landing/welcome screen or documentation sections.
Government building. Use as contextual image for the official SBBK/SPB print headers or about page.

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React.js (.js files ONLY, NO .tsx), Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI, Recharts.
instructions_to_main_agent.module_1: Dashboard must prioritize Low Stock and Expiring Goods as the 'North Star' top-left metrics. Use Pie chart for Asset Condition.
instructions_to_main_agent.module_4_and_9: SPB Request Form (Mod 4) and Mobile Scanner (Mod 9) must be extremely mobile-responsive. Use Shadcn Form elements with large touch areas.
instructions_to_main_agent.module_6: PDF Generation must include an official 'Badan POM Jember' letterhead format. Simulate this with standard HTML/CSS layout styled for print (e.g., @media print).
instructions_to_main_agent.development_rules: Always write .js components. Provide purely pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts, heavily customized Shadcn for forms/dialogs. Add data-testid to EVERY button, input, and table row.
instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Import Outfit and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth: Implement Google Auth UI components with professional styling matching the agency.
